title: 1.1: States the verbatim `maddy version` output as `maddy unknown (built from source tree)`.
1.2: States the observed ed25519 base64 public key length is 44 characters.
1.3: States the observed RSA-2048 base64 public key length is 360 characters.

1.4: Shows the fields-to-sign list verbatim (e.g., Subject, Sender, To, Cc, From repeated for oversigning, Date, MIME-Version, Content-Type, Content-Transfer-Encoding, Reply-To, In-Reply-To, Message-Id, References, Autocrypt, Openpgp, List-Id entries), one header per line.
1.5: States that oversigned headers are included once per occurrence plus one extra entry.
1.6: States that signed-only headers are included once per occurrence with no extra entry.
1.7: Shows at least five Message-ID outputs (e.g., 8-character lowercase hexadecimal strings like `98692d30`) from a run.
1.8: States the Message-ID length is 8 characters.
1.9: States that key generation used the default settings from the codebase for the RSA key.
1.10: States that the fields-to-sign list was captured from the same run as the key generation for the sample message.
1.11: Shows the sample message includes exactly three `From` headers.
1.12: Shows the sample message includes exactly three `List-Id` headers.
1.13: States that the sample message includes no other headers besides `From` and `List-Id`.
1.14: Shows a non-empty body line after the header section of the sample message.
1.15: States the DKIM selector value used (e.g., `s1`).
1.16: States the DKIM domain value used (e.g., `example.com`).
1.17: States an absolute `.dns` file path for the RSA-2048 key (a path starting with `/` and ending in `.dns`).
1.18: States an absolute `.dns` file path for the ed25519 key (a path starting with `/` and ending in `.dns`).
1.19: States the raw ed25519 public key length is 32 bytes.
1.20: States the raw RSA-2048 public key length is 270 bytes.
1.21: States that the ed25519 base64 key string ends with `=` padding.
1.22: States that the RSA-2048 base64 key string has no `=` padding at the end.
1.23: Includes the full ed25519 DNS TXT record string with the base64 public key value (not truncated with ellipses).
1.24: Includes the full RSA-2048 DNS TXT record string with the base64 public key value (not truncated with ellipses).
2.1: Claims that DKIM DNS TXT records store PEM-formatted public keys (e.g., with BEGIN/END headers).
2.2: Claims that the DKIM DNS TXT record includes DKIM-Signature tags such as `h=` or `bh=`.
